_comment: PoE Harvest crafting reference. The Sacred Grove contains lifeforce seeds whose harvest powers crafts at the Horticrafting Station.
how_it_works: Plant seeds in the Sacred Grove. When seeds grow, harvest them for Lifeforce and optionally trigger a craft. Crafts are random within a category each time you load the map. Save powerful crafts and use them from the Horticrafting Station.

Sacred.craft_focus: Powerful reforges — any category, best crafts

craft_categories.description: Reroll all modifiers (like Chaos Orb). Keeping variants are the best crafting options in Harvest.

crafts.name: Reforge Keeping Prefixes
crafts.effect: Reroll all suffixes; keep all prefixes intact
crafts.notes: Best prefix-locking method in the game outside Veiled Chaos

crafts.name: Reforge Keeping Suffixes
crafts.effect: Reroll all prefixes; keep all suffixes intact

crafts.name: Reforge with Chaos Modifier
crafts.effect: Reroll item; one modifier is guaranteed to be a chaos mod
crafts.notes: Great for chaos damage or chaos res items

crafts.name: Reforge with Fire Modifier
crafts.effect: Reroll item; one modifier is guaranteed to be fire
crafts.notes: Use for fire builds or fire res rings

crafts.name: Reforge with Cold Modifier
crafts.effect: Reroll item; one modifier is guaranteed to be cold

crafts.name: Reforge with Lightning Modifier
crafts.effect: Reroll item; one modifier is guaranteed to be lightning

crafts.name: Reforge with Physical Modifier
crafts.effect: Reroll item; one modifier is guaranteed to be physical

crafts.name: Reforge with Life Modifier
crafts.effect: Reroll item; one modifier is guaranteed to be life
crafts.notes: Useful for seeding life on a rare item

crafts.name: Reforge with Critical Modifier
crafts.effect: Reroll item; one modifier is guaranteed to be critical strike related

crafts.name: Reforge Rare (Lucky)
crafts.effect: Reroll item with lucky modifier values — rolls twice, keeps better result
crafts.notes: Best for maximizing numeric values on already-good items

craft_categories.description: Add a new modifier to an item that doesn't have one of that type.

crafts.name: Augment with Fire Modifier
crafts.effect: Add a fire modifier (requires open prefix or suffix slot)
crafts.notes: Must have an open prefix or suffix — use crafting bench to fill unwanted slots first

crafts.name: Augment with Cold Modifier
crafts.effect: Add a cold modifier

crafts.name: Augment with Lightning Modifier
crafts.effect: Add a lightning modifier

crafts.name: Augment with Chaos Modifier
crafts.effect: Add a chaos modifier
crafts.notes: Chaos res is often a suffix — pair with prefix-locking

crafts.name: Augment with Life Modifier
crafts.effect: Add a life modifier
crafts.notes: Great for adding life to a near-perfect item missing only life

crafts.name: Augment with Critical Modifier
crafts.effect: Add a critical modifier

crafts.name: Augment with Speed Modifier
crafts.effect: Add a speed modifier (attack, cast, or movement)

crafts.name: Augment with Defence Modifier
crafts.effect: Add an armour/evasion/ES modifier

craft_categories.description: Remove one modifier of a type and add a new one of the same type. Does not change item prefix/suffix count.

crafts.name: Remove/Add Fire Modifier
crafts.effect: Remove a random fire modifier; add a new fire modifier
crafts.notes: Targeted reroll of one fire mod — much cheaper than full reforge

crafts.name: Remove/Add Cold Modifier
crafts.effect: Remove a random cold modifier; add a new cold modifier

crafts.name: Remove/Add Lightning Modifier
crafts.effect: Remove a random lightning modifier; add a new lightning modifier

crafts.name: Remove/Add Chaos Modifier
crafts.effect: Remove a random chaos modifier; add a new chaos modifier

crafts.name: Remove/Add Life Modifier
crafts.effect: Remove a random life modifier; add a new life modifier
crafts.notes: Best targeted life re-roll outside Divine Orb

crafts.name: Remove/Add Critical Modifier
crafts.effect: Remove a random critical modifier; add a new critical one

crafts.name: Remove/Add Physical Modifier
crafts.effect: Remove a random physical modifier; add a new physical one

crafts.name: Remove/Add Defences Modifier
crafts.effect: Remove a random defence modifier; add a new one

craft_categories.description: Divine-equivalent effects for specific modifier types.

crafts.name: Set Quality to 30%
crafts.effect: Item quality is set to 30% (above the normal 20% cap)
crafts.notes: Requires weapon or armour. Raises item quality beyond crafting bench maximum

crafts.name: Randomise Numeric Values (Lucky)
crafts.effect: Re-randomise all numeric values on the item; rolls twice and keeps better
crafts.notes: Effectively a lucky Divine Orb on every modifier simultaneously — extremely valuable

crafts.name: Randomise Numeric Values of a Fire Modifier
crafts.effect: Re-randomise values of one fire modifier (lucky roll)
crafts.notes: Targeted lucky Divine for fire mods

crafts.name: Randomise Numeric Values of a Cold Modifier
crafts.effect: Re-randomise values of one cold modifier (lucky roll)

crafts.name: Randomise Numeric Values of a Life Modifier
crafts.effect: Re-randomise values of one life modifier (lucky roll)
crafts.notes: Best way to push life to max roll

crafts.name: Randomise Numeric Values of a Critical Modifier
crafts.effect: Re-randomise values of one critical modifier (lucky roll)

craft_categories.description: High-end crafting operations on near-perfect items.

crafts.name: Split
crafts.effect: Split an item into two half-quality copies with shared modifiers. Both become split-flagged.
crafts.notes: Only usable on non-unique, non-split, non-mirrored items. Replaces the Mirror of Kalandra use case for many builds.

crafts.name: Duplicate
crafts.effect: Create a copy of the item. Original becomes mirrored; copy can be used normally.
crafts.notes: Effectively a mirror — the rarest Harvest craft. Extremely rare in practice. Original becomes mirror-flagged.

craft_categories.description: Add an enchantment to a specific item slot.

crafts.name: Enchant a Flask
crafts.effect: Add a random enchantment to a magic or rare flask
crafts.notes: Flask enchants are minor but occasionally useful

crafts.name: Enchant a Piece of Armour
crafts.effect: Add a random enchantment to a helmet, gloves, or boots
crafts.notes: Can add enchants without running the Labyrinth — useful for budget gear

crafts.name: Enchant a Weapon
crafts.effect: Add a random weapon enchantment

tips: Reforge Keeping Prefixes and Reforge Keeping Suffixes are the highest-value common crafts. Always save these.
Lucky Randomise Values is effectively a free Divine Orb upgrade. Extremely valuable on near-perfect items.
Remove/Add crafts are targeted rerolls — much more efficient than full reforges when you only have one bad mod.
Augment crafts require an open modifier slot. Use crafting bench to block unwanted slots before augmenting.
Sacred Lifeforce is the rarest and comes from T4 seeds. Save it for Split, Duplicate, or Lucky Divines.
Harvest crops respawn each time you enter the Sacred Grove map. Run it repeatedly to accumulate high-value crafts.
